full_text:
Huang Lang (Wenta)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Lang, styledWenta, was born in Pei. Widely respected by the leading men of the region, always polite to his subordinates. Huang Lang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Huang Lang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
